name: Tony Cedras
abstract: Tony Cedras (c. 1952 – 29 January 2024) was a South African accordion, harmonium, keyboard and guitar player.

about_quotes.speaker: Warren Bernhardt
about_quotes.evidence: And I got to play with Vincent Nguini and Bakithi Kumalo with Paul Simon, you know, the “Graceland” guys and stuff, and Tony Cedras.
about_quotes.doc_title: Warren Bernhardt interviewed by Monk Rowe, Bearsville, New York, January 3, 2012
